payload.title: Dynamic status validation against column set
payload.description: Replace the static enum checks (src/event-schema.js ticket.create + set_field, src/repo.js updateTicket) with validation against the workspace's configured columns. Define a fallback for a status whose column was deleted or not-yet-synced (e.g. keep the value, render under an 'Unknown' column) so out-of-order/cross-client events never get rejected.
